s: In 2014, Kyle Crockett suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.800, WHIP 1.130, SO 28, WAR 0.300.
In 2015, Kyle Crockett suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.080, WHIP 1.360, SO 15, WAR 0.100.
In 2016, Kyle Crockett suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.060, WHIP 1.440, SO 17, WAR 0.300.

Changed teams after the previous season (CLE -> CIN).
In 2018, Kyle Crockett suited up for CIN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.790, WHIP 1.930, SO 11, WAR 0.200. Notable context: Joined CIN.
